goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should go to 'stansted airport' and should 'arrive by 08:00'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on thursday
The train should go to stansted airport and should arrive by 08:00
Make sure you get travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee and postcode
